fetchBinance24hStatsAndAttest(bytes).notice: Fetch public Binance 24h market stats and return a TEE-signed attestation payload.

fetchBinanceAccountPnlAndAttest(bytes).notice: Fetch authenticated Binance futures account PnL and return a TEE-signed attestation payload.

fetchBinanceAccountSummaryAndAttest(byte.notice: Fetch authenticated Binance spot account balances and return a TEE-signed account summary payload.

fetchBinanceAndAttest(bytes).notice: Fetch Binance ticker data in the TEE and return a TEE-signed attestation payload.

fetchBinanceUserProfileAndAttest(bytes).notice: Fetch authenticated Binance user profile (UID, account type, permissions, balances)         and return a TEE-signed payload. The result is ABI-encoded (payload, signature)         where signature is a 65-byte secp256k1 sig over keccak256(payload) by the TEE key.

setExtensionId().notice: Discover and store this contract's extension ID.

sign(bytes).notice: Request the TEE to sign a message with the stored private key.

updateKey(bytes).notice: Update the stored private key by sending an encrypted key to the TEE.
